mapper.select: /** 통합게시판코멘트 상세 조회 */ SELECT * FROM t_lecture_board_comment WHERE IDX=#{idx}
mapper.insert: /** 통합게시판코멘트 등록 */ INSERT INTO t_lecture_board_comment (P_IDX,B_IDX,CONTENT,REG_ID,REG_NM,REG_NK,REG_DT,MOD_ID,MOD_DT,G_IDX,G_ORD,G_LVL,STATUS,EDU_SEQ) VALUES (#{pIdx},#{bIdx},#{content},#{regId},#{regNm},#{regNk},#{regDt},#{modId},#{modDt},#{idx},#{gOrd},#{gLvl},#{status},#{eduSeq})
